name: Dolmathes - Stuffed Grape Leaves - Greek
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté onions in olive oil.
2. Add rice and brown lightly.
3. Cook rice according to directions with half the lemon juice.
4. Add dill, mint, parsley, and pine nuts.
5. Rinse grape leaves in cold water. Remove stems and place 1 tablespoon of rice mixture on the dull side, folding in the sides and rolling up the leaves.
6. Put dolmathes in a 10x13 pan with the open end down. Cover with remaining oil, lemon juice, and enough water to cover at least half the dolmathes.
7. Cover with aluminum foil and place in a preheated oven at 375°F for 45 minutes.
8. When cool, stack dolmathes on a plate, cover with plastic wrap, and refrigerate for 1 day.
9. Serve with lemon wedges.
